creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #1)
Wen, Thankyou for maintaining Ilias which I hope you'll continue.  Its a great product.

Ilias 8 is intended to support php8. First stable 8.0 release planned for August 29, 2022.  Refer: https://docu.ilias.de/goto.php?target=wiki_1357_Release_8
